output: A downstream adapter module (TypeScript) committed via PR, with end-to-end tests showing the downstream project receiving cleared items.
context: The first downstream adapter wires the cleared-item fan-out contract to a real downstream Elyos project, either a11y-alttext-commons for image alt-text or a transcription lane. The adapter must propagate rights basis, jurisdiction, attribution, and share-alike obligations into the downstream intake. Depends on contract-001 and data-001. See PLAN.md (Solution approach section 7, M2 exit criterion b).
title: Adapter: cleared items to a downstream lane (alt-text or transcription)
acceptanceCriteria: The adapter reads cleared-item records in the JSON-LD contract format and translates them to the target downstream project's intake format.
Rights basis, jurisdiction, attribution, and CC-BY-SA share-alike obligations are propagated without loss.
The adapter is idempotent: re-running with the same input does not create duplicate downstream intake records (keyed by LoC item ID + content hash).
The downstream project is confirmed as receiving correctly-attributed items in at least one end-to-end test.
High-stakes downstream content triggers the lane's expert-review and not-advice flag.
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass.
objective: Build the first downstream adapter (TypeScript, agent-neutral) that translates a cleared-item JSON-LD record into a downstream Elyos project's intake format, propagating rights basis, jurisdiction, attribution, and share-alike obligations, wired so the downstream project receives correctly-attributed items.
